qa_pairs.question: What happens in the usage figure if an end time after the present is selected?
qa_pairs.answer: If you select an end time after the present time, the figure will display a transparent red area overlaid on the future time, labelled as "Projection".

qa_pairs.question: How are running jobs accounted for in the projection period of the usage figure?
qa_pairs.answer: In the projection period, each running job is assumed to run until its requested time limit.

qa_pairs.question: How are queued jobs accounted for in the projection period?
qa_pairs.answer: For queued resources, the projection assumes that each pending job starts at the beginning of the projected time (i.e., immediately) and runs until its requested time limit.

qa_pairs.question: Is the projection in the usage figure intended to be an actual forecast of future events?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the projection feature is not intended to be a forecast of actual future events.
